title: Engineering Leadership
description: Years spent learning how to set the bar, grow the people around me and create the conditions where sustained, high-quality output is the norm rather than the exception.
A running practice of shaping organizations around the work: clear ownership, processes that serve outcomes, and alignment between engineering, product and the business.
title: Organization Design

description: Architecting durable, performance-first systems with a *code-is-a-liability* mindset I've spent a long time refining, balancing reliability, developer experience and cost so platforms keep paying off years later.
title: Systems & Architecture
R&D & Innovation
description: Turning open-ended problems into validated bets has become the throughline of my work: rapid prototyping, tight feedback loops, and scaling proven ideas from experiment to production platform.
